overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban area with power lines and fenced facilities, crossing a street at an intersection, and ending with a view of a sunken highway channel. The setting features warm afternoon lighting against red rock mountains and cyberpunk industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk alongside fenced facility with power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a chain-link fence with industrial buildings and power lines on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large lattice steel tower with multiple power lines extending across the scene
tall security fence with barbed wire topping running parallel to the sidewalk
low-rise industrial structures with corrugated metal and concrete construction
distinctive reddish-brown mountain ridge forming the backdrop of the urban landscape
wooden utility pole with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along an industrial sidewalk bordered by a tall chain-link fence with barbed wire on the right. High voltage transmission towers and industrial warehouses line the left side of the street, while a distinctive red rock mountain formation dominates the distant background. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction on the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: stops at red traffic light at the intersection corner
traffic light changes and begins crossing the multi-lane street
turns left after crossing and continues walking on the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic signal then crossing the intersection and turning left to proceed along the new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection as the camera waits at the light

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light mounted on a metal pole
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade visible after turning
modern street light with horizontal orange fixture

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a red traffic light at an urban intersection, then crosses the asphalt crosswalk as the signal changes. After crossing, the camera turns left, revealing a modern glass tower on the left side. The high voltage towers and security fence from the previous segment fall behind as the perspective shifts to the new street corner with different street furniture and signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway approaching overpass with sunken highway below

events.description: approaches railing and looks down into the sunken concrete highway channel

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then stopping at the railing to look down into the sunken highway channel below

entered.detail: deep concrete channel with multiple lanes of traffic running below street level
steep concrete retaining walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
metal safety railing along the edge of the overpass overlooking the sunken road

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the sidewalk past street lamps and utility poles, approaching an overpass. The camera stops at the railing and looks down into a massive sunken concrete highway channel with graffiti-covered walls. Vehicles can be seen moving through the depressed roadway below, while industrial structures and the red rock mountains remain visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial urban corridor that transitions from a fenced perimeter to a high-altitude overlook of a sunken highway. It begins with a walk along a sidewalk bordered by a barbed-wire chain-link fence and high-voltage transmission towers, with red rock mountains looming in the distance. As the camera reaches an urban intersection, it pauses at a red light before crossing the asphalt street and turning left, shifting the perspective away from the industrial warehouses toward a modern glass tower. The scene then continues past street lamps and utility poles toward an overpass, where the camera finally stops at a railing to look down into a massive concrete highway channel featuring graffiti-covered walls and flowing traffic below.
